uplink.description: Status report: climate reading, no shock, no alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame (input bytes from the upstream ttn-example status report). expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping to the normalized vocabulary: Temperature/Humidity -> air.*, ShockTamperAlarm -> action.motion.detected + tamperAlarm.

uplink.description: Status report: shock detected with all four threshold alarms set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame covering the motion category (action.motion.detected == true) plus every threshold-alarm bit. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping to the vocabulary.

uplink.description: Status report: negative temperature and low-battery flag
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; byte4 high bit -> lowBattery extra with masked voltage, byte5 high bit -> two's-complement negative temperature. expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping to the vocabulary.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame (reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic (input bytes from the upstream ttn-example startup report, padded to 11 bytes); reportType byte[3] == 0x00 is a version/datecode frame with no normalized measurement.
Synthetic; fPort 23 carries config command responses, not measurements.
